text: [en.testjsonl] In the name of God, the Compassionate, the Merciful.
[en.testjsonl] Praise be to God, Lord of the Worlds.
[en.testjsonl] Master of the Day of Judgment.
[en.testjsonl] Thee do we worship, and Thine aid we seek.
[en.testjsonl] The path of those whom Thou hast favoured; not the path of those who earn Thine anger nor of those who go astray.
[en.testjsonl] This is the Book; in it is guidance sure, without doubt, to those who fear God.
[en.testjsonl] Who believe in the Unseen, are steadfast in prayer, and spend out of what We have provided for them.
[en.testjsonl] God! There is no god but He, the Living, the Self-subsisting, Eternal.
[en.testjsonl] Let there be no compulsion in religion: Truth stands out clear from Error.
[en.testjsonl] Say: I seek refuge with the Lord of Mankind.
[en.testjsonl] From the mischief of the Whisperer who withdraws.
[en.testjsonl] Who whispers into the hearts of Mankind.
